entities.name: CG 7
entities.description: A high yielding virginia bunch groundnut variety also known as ICGMS 42 or ICGV-SM 83708

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The general crop species to which CG 7 and Chalimbana belong

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The ability to produce a large amount of seed, potentially reaching 2 t/ha for CG 7

entities.name: VIRGINIA BUNCH
entities.description: A specific type or classification of groundnut variety

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where CG 7 is recommended for cultivation and Chalimbana is widely grown

entities.name: CONFECTIONERY USE
entities.description: The application of groundnuts for sweets and snacks

entities.name: OIL EXTRACTION
entities.description: The process of deriving oil from groundnuts

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand periods of low water availability

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A period of abnormally dry weather

entities.name: HARVESTABILITY
entities.description: The ease with which a crop can be harvested

entities.name: CHALIMBANA
entities.description: A widely grown groundnut variety in Malawi used as a comparison for CG 7
